title: lithocarpus chevalieri
intro: Lithocarpus chevalieri, also known as Chevalier's tanbark oak, is a species of plant in the beech family Fagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lithocarpus chevalieri include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Lithocarpus chevalieri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
